misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a fiery spirit and formidable game to the greens. Representing Hirsala Golf, Simo's passion for the sport is matched only by his... colorful vocabulary, a trait that occasionally punctuates his otherwise focused demeanor.

A veteran of the Hector Trophée, Simo is set to make his eleventh appearance in 2026. With three Hector Trophée victories under his belt, Simo's experience and competitive drive make him a perennial contender. While the coveted Victor Trophy has eluded him, his sights are firmly set on future triumphs.

Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Simo adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, a testament to his commitment to refining his skills and seeking every possible advantage. His presence on the course is always notable, and his fans eagerly anticipate his performance at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.
